name: ProtoBindingRulesForm
description: Per-connection protobuf topic-binding rules: add, edit, reorder, delete, and test topic matches against loaded message types.

props.name: rules
props.description: ProtoBindingRuleView[] in priority order; the topmost wins ties on an equally specific filter.

props.name: descriptorNames
props.description: Full message-type names available from the loaded proto registry.

props.name: status
props.description: loadError/dirMissing/folderNotFound summary. dirMissing (no dir configured) picks the empty-state copy; loadError and folderNotFound gate the stale-type warning on rows. The section's own status line (file/type counts) is rendered by the container above this component and isn't passed down.

props.name: connected
props.description: Shows the 'Bindings apply immediately' line when true.

notes: Props-only render (no store reads, no bindings imports); the ProtoSection container owns bindings calls, rule CRUD, and ProtoStateChanged refetch. The type picker (search input + DropdownMenuItem list, max-h-[320px] overflow-y-auto) is a single component-internal {#snippet}, shared by committed rows and the draft row, and mirrors the AddToCollectionMenu pattern; extracting a shared SearchableDropdownMenu primitive across components is a good follow-up (explicitly a v1 non-goal in the per-topic-protobuf design doc).
